compiled_state.title: dso:onboarding: single turn -> multiple questions asked simultaneously
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
/dso:onboarding violates the one-question-per-message UX convention by asking multiple questions simultaneously. Example observed: 'Where does this project run in production? And how are secrets managed?' These should be asked sequentially, one at a time.
